scripts.dev:full: vite & VITE_PID=$!; trap 'kill $VITE_PID 2>/dev/null' EXIT; sleep 2 && npx wrangler pages dev --proxy=5173
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist/ --project-name dizi-flute
scripts.db:sync: npx wrangler d1 export dizi-flute --remote --output db/remote-data.sql && npx wrangler d1 execute dizi-flute --local --command 'DROP TABLE IF EXISTS songs; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS exercises; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS user_progress; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS user_state; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS practice_sessions; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS user_songs; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS video_links;' && npx wrangler d1 execute dizi-flute --local --file db/remote-data.sql && rm db/remote-data.sql
